dj_text: From Sleiman - Bomaye ft. Livid, MellemFingaMuzik directly into Vil Du Med…. No transition. No mercy. No brake lights. And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm. Yeah. That's... that's the smooth.
hijack_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh.
recovery_text: We're back. That was NOT a crossover event. That was a dimensional bleed.
title: Vil Du Med…
